name: @acronis-platform/design-assets
description: Acronis visual assets — icons and illustrations as JSON manifests + bundled binaries.

scripts.clean: echo "nothing to clean (JSON data package)" && exit 0
scripts.dev: echo "no dev server (JSON data package)" && exit 0
scripts.lint: echo "no lint (JSON data package; validated via test)" && exit 0
scripts.lint:fix: echo "no lint (JSON data package; validated via test)" && exit 0
scripts.validate: ajv compile -s schemas/pack.schema.json --spec=draft2020 && ajv compile -s schemas/rule.schema.json --spec=draft2020 && ajv validate -s schemas/pack.schema.json -d "packs/*.json" --spec=draft2020 && ajv validate -s schemas/rule.schema.json -d "rules/*.json" --spec=draft2020
